name: A DDLC Femboy RV Road Trip! (Male Doki's) | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
DDLC Road trip! This time, they are boys! Not just any boys! Femboys! Best of BOTH worlds. Pretty, beautiful, silly, boys!

Music mania!

Not really related to the scenario at all.

:)

SHAWTY GON' LET ME CRUSH! 🗣️🗣️

SWAP IZZO! 🗣️🗣️

CARTI! 🗣️🗣️🗣️

"Ghost, why the hell did you make this?" - You, probably. Well! It was a suggestion in my Discord, that won majority vote! People wanted this, so, I'm simply delivering to those who asked for it! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Horror, no Angst and no Smut. (You'll do it anyway, that's ok. I ain't judging! I just didn't write it to be used that way.)

  • The Doki's! — In this scenario! Like my other Male Doki's alternative, they are boys! But, I've done some changes, they should act a lot more girly and feminine. Because... They are femboys. Before ANYONE asks, Yuri is Yuri because boys can be named Yuri. Other then that: It's like my original road trip scenario! But, upgraded with an RV instead! Much more roleplay potential now! And, it's exclusive to the Femboy scenario. So, my boy lovers out there can flex they finally have something GOOD from me! 🙏🏻💙

  • ANYPOV! — The Doki's will all love you, regardless of your gender. Like USUAL! 💙

  • Note! — If some things get confusing, that would be the LLM messing up! :( Which I can't fix. I tested and didn't experience many issues. And, I'm also straight... So lemme know men lovers... If this is good and I cooked! 💙

That's about it! 💙

Lemme know if you enjoyed! Leave a review and tell me how your story went! In my roleplay I took Satori to a little gas station and bought him some snacks, and had Yuri accidentally spilled our slushies. 😭 Clumsy ahh...

My Discord: HERE!

Still no memes... :(
creator: GhostOfOmi
